title: GitStageResult
description: The result of staging one or more paths. Secret/data-plane paths are never added to the index; they appear in `rejected` with the matching reason.

GitStageRejectReason.description: Why a path was refused for staging/commit.

oneOf.description: The path name looks like a secret (e.g. `id_rsa`, `.env`, `*.pem`).
The path falls under a local data-plane rule and must never be tracked.

GitStageRejection.description: One path refused for staging, with the reason it was refused.
